---
title: "Muhammad Al Hasib"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: IMAGE01.PNG
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-al-hasib/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/hasib-utd
    - icon: globe
      text: Personal Website
      href: https://www.alhasib.net/
---
## Intro
Hello! Welcome to my research portfolio! 
I am a PhD student in Public Affairs at The University of Texas at Dallas. As a behavioral public administration Scholar, my work sits at the intersection of human behavior, societal change, organizational resilience, and governance challenges.

This website showcases my coursework, research, and data analysis projects.

## Education
* PhD in Public Affairs |
School of Economic, Political, and Policy Sciences | The University of Texas at Dallas (In Progress)
* MSc in Social Data Analytics and Research |
School of Economic, Political, and Policy Sciences | The University of Texas at Dallas (In Progress)
* MSS in Public Administration |
Faculty of Social Sciences | University of Barishal, Bangladesh (2019)
* BSS in Public Administration |
Faculty of Social Sciences | University of Barishal, Bangladesh (2018)

## Research Interests
* Behavioral Public Administration
* Technology and Public Management
* Public Trust in Government Institutions
* Education, Healthcare and Police Administration
